def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Array(Int64)
    let N = nums.len
    if N == 0
        return []

    let minVal = Int64.min

    // 1. Calculate Prefix Maximums (PMax[i] = max(nums[0]...nums[i-1]))
    let PMax = Array(N)
    var currentMaxLeft = minVal
    for i in 0..<N
        PMax[i] = currentMaxLeft
        currentMaxLeft = max(currentMaxLeft, nums[i])

    // 2. Calculate Suffix Maximums (SMax[i] = max(nums[i+1]...nums[N-1]))
    let SMax = Array(N)
    var currentMaxRight = minVal
    for i in (0..N-1).reverse
        SMax[i] = currentMaxRight
        currentMaxRight = max(currentMaxRight, nums[i])

    // 3. Identify Valid Elements
    let result = Array(0) // Dynamic array for results
    for i in 0..<N
        let isValidLeft = nums[i] > PMax[i]
        let isValidRight = nums[i] > SMax[i]

        if isValidLeft || isValidRight
            result.push(nums[i])

    return result
```
